titleZh: 日本东京A株式会社与松某申请行为保全案
titleEn: Typical Case: Tokyo A Co., Ltd. of Japan v. Song Mou in an Application for Conduct Preservation
forumZh: 最高人民法院依法保护外商投资权益典型案例
forumEn: Supreme People's Court Typical Cases on Protecting Foreign Investment Rights
citation: 最高法典型案例：公司证照保全
issuesZh: 法定代表人变更后的公司控制
issuesEn: return of company certificates and seals
corporate control after replacement of the legal representative
holdingZh: 原法定代表人拒绝执行股东决定和董事会决议、拒不移交公司证照并继续以公司名义活动，足以危及公司正常经营和股东权利的，人民法院可以依法采取行为保全，禁止其继续控制和使用公司印章证照，并责令交由第三方保管。
holdingEn: Where a former legal representative refuses to implement shareholder and board decisions, withholds company certificates and seals, and continues acting in the company's name so as to threaten normal operations and shareholder rights, a court may grant conduct preservation, prohibit further control or use of the company's seals and certificates, and order their transfer to a designated third party for safekeeping.
